summary: The language root delivers a complete, self-contained definition of Agentish: its values, rejections, actor model, and failure modes. Nearly every line carries load. The when/then causal blocks concretely model how over-optimization and symbolic compression degrade the language's own goals, which is both instructive and self-demonstrating. A few coined terms (ActivationPreload, GenerativeYield, AdjacentInference) carry slight interpretive slack since they are valued but never grounded in examples or definitions within the file itself. As a corpus anchor, every other Agentish file references its type declarations and inherits its philosophy, giving it strong live-use evidence and near-zero obsolescence risk.
strengths: Opens with explicit purpose and requirements, making the file immediately self-describing to any reader
The two when/then anti-pattern blocks (over-optimization, symbolic compression) model failure causality concretely and serve as built-in quality guardrails
Practices what it preaches: high semantic density with no filler lines, comments, or redundant phrasing
Actor-entity-system topology (Human, Agent, Visualizer, Blueprint, Codebase) is cleanly separated and each relationship is directional and causal
Foundational corpus role is unambiguous — every Agentish file depends on this definition via reference path
weaknesses: Terms like ActivationPreload, GenerativeYield, and AdjacentInference are valued but never defined or grounded, leaving moderate interpretive slack for readers encountering Agentish for the first time
The Visualizer actor is introduced and given one relationship (projects Blueprint) but has no when/then behavioral rules, making it feel underspecified relative to Agent and Human
No explicit versioning or change-management signal — if the language definition evolves, downstream files have no way to detect incompatibility from the file alone
